user_system_path: Owner-named seam: upgrade the Stripe Node SDK 18.5.0 -> 22.2.2 (dependabot #437), a 4-major jump on the live payments SDK. Review finding: the 3 API routes (checkout/portal/webhook) pin apiVersion: '2025-08-27.basil' as any and lib/stripe/subscription-db.ts uses defensive `as unknown as` casts for current_period_end, so the code already absorbs SDK type drift. Decision: KEEP the pinned apiVersion at '2025-08-27.basil' so this is a pure library update with ZERO runtime API-behavior change (Stripe honors the pinned version even though stripe@22 bundles types for '2026-05-27.dahlia'). Migrating basil->dahlia is deferred to a separate seam needing live verification. No source changes required — only package.json + package-lock.json. Constraint: NO paid API calls — proven in the local harness.
allowed_files_raw: Stripe SDK bump seam: only package.json + package-lock.json plus control-plane + docs may change (the SDK bump needs no source edits; apiVersion stays pinned).
forbidden_files_raw: No runtime/schema/api source changes — this seam is the Stripe SDK version bump only, apiVersion intentionally unchanged.
required_local_proof: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npx vitest run app/api/stripe lib/stripe && npm run gate:continuity
required_browser_proof: Pre-push public-routes Playwright smoke green (covers /pricing checkout-redirect path).
browser_proof_command: git push (pre-push hook runs build + public-routes e2e smoke)
acceptance_condition: stripe at ^22.2.2; apiVersion still '2025-08-27.basil'; typecheck + build + Stripe unit tests + gate:continuity green; pre-push smoke green; contract restored to between-rungs scope before merge.
stop_condition: Stop when the Stripe SDK bump is merged, #437 is closed, and the control plane is rolled back to between-rungs.
next_command: After merge, roll the control plane back to between-rungs. Future optional seam: migrate the pinned Stripe apiVersion basil -> dahlia with live verification.
